title: CT Mods
body: # CT Mods ## What is this? This is an simply mod running on fabric. ## What does it do? This mod added many useful items, such as a **Prospector**, it can help us find ores(only diamonds and iron now) in survival gamemode. But if you want to get it, you needs some wool, redstone, iron ingots and a new item in the mod(CT Crystal). There's more other interesting contents inside the mod, so download and experience it! ## Commands **Not developed yet, but we are working on this project.** ## Permissions Check back when the command feature goes live! ## Q&A ### Q: What version of Minecraft should be used? A: This series of mods is for version 1.20 and later, we are also working hard on versions in 1.19-1.19.4. We don't have a plan before version 1.19. ### Q: How can I report a bug? A: We always welcome bug reports from players,and you can report bugs by sending us an email(), it helps us to make it better.
